name: AdamW TTT (30ep cosine + per-layer LR) on PR #549 SOTA
author: sunnypatneedi
blurb: PR #549 SOTA base + PR #481 AdamW TTT recipe (30ep cosine decay, per-layer LR: mlp.proj 3x, mlp.fc 0.5x). Replaces weak 3ep SGD TTT with proven AdamW recipe for -0.075 bpb gain. 3-seed mean: 1.0705 (std 0.0009). All artifacts under 16MB, total eval ~589s.
